step_rationale: Distinguishes AMI from other ischemic conditions; MI-specific injury marker.
mechanism: miR-519e-5p expression pattern differentiates acute myocardial infarction from non-infarction ischemia, reflecting cardiomyocyte injury specificity.

references.title: Atherosclerosis-related circulating miRNAs as novel and sensitive predictors for acute myocardial infarction.
